original_name: 追放された転生重騎士はゲーム知識で無双する
name: 追放された転生重騎士はゲーム知識で無双する
title: 追放された転生重騎士はゲーム知識で無双する
title_en: The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System
overview_en: Born into a prestigious family of master swordsmen Elymas Edvaughn s future shatters when he awakens the so called defective Heavy Knight class Disowned and cast out he regains memories of another life and realizes this world mirrors a VR game he once mastered Armed with knowledge no one else possesses he sets out to rewrite his fate and prove the strength of the weakest class

original_name: 幼女戦記
overview: تدور القصة حول تانيا دوغريف وهي فتاة شقراء ذات عينين زرقاوتين وبشرة بيضاء صافية كالخزف الصيني تُدعى تانيا دِغورِتشاف ومهمتها هي قيادة الجيش وعليها أن تُقاتل بضراوة لتغدو الأعتى بين المقاتلين والسحرة تملك روح هذه الفتاة ماضٍ مختلف عن واقعها الحالي
name: يوجو سنكاي: ملحمة تانيا
title: يوجو سنكاي ملحمة تانيا
overview_en: On the front lines of the war Tanya Degurechaff blond hair blue eyes and porcelain white skin commands her squad with lisping voice Actually she is one of Japan s most elite salary men reborn as a little girl into a world of magical warfare after angering a mysterious being who calls himself God

original_name: 黄泉のツガイ
overview: يعيش يورو وهو صياد شاب في قرية صغيرة في أعماق الجبال يصطاد الطرائد البرية ويعيش حياة متواضعة مع آسا شقيقته التوأم الصغرى تنقلب حياتهم الهادئة رأسًا على عقب عندما يهاجمهم تنين
name: 黄泉のツガイ
title: 黄泉のツガイ
overview_en: Yuru a young hunter lives in a small village deep in the mountains hunting wild game and leading a humble life with Asa his younger twin sister Their peaceful lives are torn apart when a dragon s roar echoes across the sky What secrets lurk within their village What fate awaits them

original_name: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
name: 透明な夜に駆ける君と、目に見えない恋をした。
title: 透明な夜に駆ける君と 目に見えない恋をした
title_en: Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky
overview_en: Kakeru Sorano a quiet university freshman who avoids others meets Koharu Fuyutsuki a blind girl who faces the world with quiet brightness When she says I want to see fireworks someday something in Kakeru shifts As they grow closer through small moments and shared loneliness he searches for a way to make her wish come true

original_name: クレバテス-魔獣の王と赤子と屍の勇者
name: クレバテス-魔獣の王と赤子と屍の勇者
title: クレバテス 魔獣の王と赤子と屍の勇者
overview_en: One of the Lords of Dark Beasts Clevatess s reign shatters when he revives a hero he personally slayed and adopts an orphaned humanoid baby the last hope to save a dying world Now bound together what fate awaits this unlikely trio

original_name: とんがり帽子のアトリエ
overview: في عالمٍ يُعد فيه السحر هبةً تولد مع البعض فقط تحلم كوكو الفتاة القروية البسيطة بأن تصبح ساحرة رغم علمها باستحالة ذلك لكن حياتها تنقلب رأساً على عقب عندما تكتشف بالصدفة السر الحقيقي وراء إلقاء التعاويذ وهو أن السحر يُرسم ولا يُورث بعد حادثة مأساوية تسببت بها جهلها بالقواعد يقرر الساحر كيفري اتخاذها تلميذة له تبدأ كوكو رحلتها في المرسم لتعلم فن رسم السحر في قصة تمزج بين بهجة الاكتشاف ومرارة اليأس والسعي نحو الأمل
name: ورشة ذوي القبعات
title: ورشة ذوي القبعات
overview_en: In a world where only witches can cast magic they must avoid being seen by ordinary people while casting While Coco does her chores she daydreams of becoming a witch When a young witch named Qifrey visits her village Coco uncovers the absolute secret becomes Qifrey s apprentice and begins her studies This is the story of children who encounter despair yet reach out toward hope

original_name: 片田舎のおっさん、剣聖になる
overview: بيريل غاردنانت مبارز في منتصف العمر يدير دوجو في منطقة نائية يعيش حياة هادئة إلى أن تظهر ألوسيا تلميذته السابقة وقائدة النظام الملكي للفرسان حياة بيريل على وشك أن تتغير جذرياً حياة المدينة تلاميذه القدامى أصدقاء جدد وأعداء أقوياء كل هذا كثير عليه لكن بعد سنوات من التدريب اكتسب مهارات فائقة ولُقّب بـ سيد المبارزة في المناطق النائية
name: 片田舎のおっさん、剣聖になる
title: 片田舎のおっさん 剣聖になる
title_en: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman
overview_en: Beryl Gardenant a middle aged swordsman running a dojo in the backwaters lives a quiet life until Allucia former student and Commander of the Royal Order of Knights appears Beryl s life is about to change dramatically City life Old students New friends and formidable foes It s all too much But after years of training he has mad skills and he s been dubbed the backwater swordmaster

original_name: 天幕のジャードゥーガル
name: فقيهة المغول: سيرة فقيهة في أرض المغول
title: فقيهة المغول سيرة فقيهة في أرض المغول
overview_en: After losing her mother and her homeland Sitara s despair transforms into determination with the power of knowledge New possibilities unfold when a family of scholars takes her in deepening her education Meanwhile Genghis Khan s Mongol Empire conquers nation after nation nearing Sitara s new home After the Fourth Prince of the empire takes her captive a flame of revenge is ignited

original_name: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ はじまりの召喚士
name: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ はじまりの召喚士
title: ヘルモード やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する はじまりの召喚士
title_en: HELL MODE The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing
overview_en: Kenichi Yamada a single 35 year old businessman has spent the majority of his adult life playing every MMORPG to hit the market Tired of the constant cycle of repetitive newbie centric gameplay he is immediately drawn in by the promise of a new game that on top of being never ending offers up a Hell Mode a difficulty level that makes it nigh impossible to level up but also promises uncapped growth potential Upon selecting the newly released Summoner class Kenichi finds himself reborn as Allen an infant in a serf family with nothing but his wits and old memories to guide him

original_name: 本好きの下剋上 司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません
overview: تتوفّى عثّة كتُب نهِمة وطالبة الكلّية موتوسو أورانو على إثر حادِث قد وقع معها مباشرة بعد وصول خبر تعيينها كأمينة مكتبة وهو ما كانت تحلم به طوال حياتها ما إن استعادت وعيها حتّى وجدتْ نفسها باسم ماين وابنة لجنديّ فقير وتعيش في بلدة تتّبع نظاماً طبقياً قاسياً لكن ما دامت ماين تمتلك كتباً فإنّها لا تحتاج لأي شيء آخر غير أنّ الكتُب في هذا العالم كانت نادرة ولا يشتريها إلّا النبلاء لم يمنعها ذلك من اتّخاذها قراراً ألا وهو إن لم يكن هناك أي كتاب فسأصنع كتباً بنفسي
name: هيمنة عثة كتب
title: هيمنة عثة كتب
overview_en: When a sickly young girl suddenly becomes obsessed with inventing new things her family and friends are all puzzled What has gotten into Myne they wondered never dreaming that the answer is not a What but a Who Urano Motosu a book loving apprentice librarian who died in an earthquake in Tokyo who somehow found herself in Myne s body And since Myne s world is still in a medieval stage where books can only be owned by the elite the new Myne intends to do everything she can to bring her beloved books to the masses in the time she has left

original_name: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
name: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
title: 乙女怪獣キャラメリゼ
overview_en: Kuroe Akaishi just wants a normal high school life but that s impossible with a rare condition that turns her into a giant kaiju whenever her emotions spike Things get even worse when she falls for Arata Minami the most popular boy in class Now every blush heartbeat and crush could trigger a monster transformation Can Kuroe survive high school love before it destroys everything around her

original_name: LIAR GAME
name: LIAR GAME
title: LIAR GAME
overview_en: When Nao Kanzaki receives a strange letter and a suitcase containing 100 million yen she learns that she has been selected to participate in the LIAR GAME In this high stakes psychological battle lies deception and betrayal reign supreme Naïve and honest Nao turns to Shinichi Akiyama a brilliant former con artist to survive the twisted game In a game built on lies can honesty prevail

original_name: 世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～
name: 世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～
title: 世界最強の後衛 迷宮国の新人探索者
overview_en: After a fatal accident overworked office worker Arihito Atobe is reborn in the Labyrinth Country as a Seeker with the rare Rearguard class an all purpose support role that excels in attack defense and healing Joined by a fierce demi human mercenary and his former boss Arihito dives into deadly dungeons and rises through the ranks The adventure of the strongest support class begins

original_name: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
name: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title: 魔法少女リリカルなのは EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
title_en: Magical Girl Lyrical NANOHA EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance
overview_en: Thirty years ago aliens attacked Earth and nearly brought humanity to extinction Since then mankind has clawed for survival fighting the invaders for land and the UN established EXCEEDS an agency to stave off alien threats On a remote island in a world of chaos young hunter Shiina yearns for a quiet life with her sister Setsuna but a single incident draws her into the larger battle

original_name: 僕のヒーローアカデミア
overview: إيزوكو ميدوريا كان مجرد تلميذ عادي في المرحلة المتوسطة في عالم يسكنه أناس غير عاديين لديهم قوى خارقه للطبيعه كأبطال المجلات المصورة الأمريكية لطالما أراد أن يكون بطلاً على الرغم من أن زملاءه يسخرون منه و يتنمرون عليه لأنه لا يمتلك قوة خارقه للطبيعه في أحد الأيام شاهد وحش شرير يهاجم صديق طفولته كاتوسكي فتدخل ايزوكو وأنقذه أقوى بطل خارق في العالم أوول مايت شاهد ايزوكو و أعجب بشجاعته فطلب منه وراثه قوته الخارقة و ساعده بعد ذلك على الاندراج في أكاديمية يو إيه التي تتخصص في تخريج أبطال خارقين
name: أكاديمية الأبطال
title: أكاديمية الأبطال
overview_en: After he saves a bully from a Villain a normal student is granted a superpower that allows him to attend a high school training academy for Heroes

original_name: ⼄⼥ゲー世界はモブに厳しい世界です
name: ⼄⼥ゲー世界はモブに厳しい世界です
title: ゲー世界はモブに厳しい世界です
title_en: Trapped in a Dating Sim The World of Otome Games Is Tough for Mobs
overview_en: An ordinary office worker is reincarnated as Leon into a particularly punishing dating sim video game where women reign supreme and only beautiful men have a seat at the table But Leon has a secret weapon he remembers everything from his past life which includes a complete playthrough of the very game in which he is now trapped Watch Leon spark a revolution to change this new world in order to fulfill his ultimate desire of living a quiet easy life in the countryside

original_name: 猫と竜
name: 猫と竜
title: 猫と竜
overview_en: An orphan since hatched a lone dragon named Uncle Wings is taken in by a family of magic wielding cats and raised as one of their own As Uncle Wings grows he becomes the cats protector determined to keep them safe from humans But as he watches the cats connect with humans using their magic Uncle Wings slowly starts to warm up to humans in this heartfelt bittersweet tale

original_name: 骸骨騎士様、只今異世界へお出掛け中
name: 骸骨騎士様、只今異世界へお出掛け中
title: 骸骨騎士様 只今異世界へお出掛け中
overview_en: One day a gamer played video games until he fell asleep and when he woke up he found himself in the game world as a skeleton Equipped with the powerful weapons and armor of his avatar but stuck with its frightening skeletal appearance Arc has to find a place for himself in this new fantastical land All his hopes for a quiet life are dashed when he crosses paths with a beautiful elven warrior setting him on a journey full of conflict and adventure

original_name: 最強の王様、二度目の人生は何をする？
overview: بعد وفاة غامضة يُولد الملك غراي من جديد باسم آرثر ليوين في قارة ديكاثين السحرية وعلى الرغم من أنه يبدأ حياته الثانية كرضيع إلا أن حكمته السابقة تبقى معه يبدأ في إتقان السحر وشق طريقه الخاص مع مرور السنوات ساعيًا لتصحيح أخطاء حياته الماضية
name: البداية بعد النهاية
title: البداية بعد النهاية
overview_en: After a mysterious death King Grey is reborn as Arthur Leywin on the magical continent of Dicathen Although he enters his second life as a baby his previous wisdom remains He begins to master magic and forge his own path as the years go by seeking to correct the mistakes of his past life

original_name: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました。～魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します～
name: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました。～魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します～
title: ブチ切れ令嬢は報復を誓いました 魔導書の力で祖国を叩き潰します
title_en: A Livid Lady s Guide to Getting Even How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires
overview_en: After being publicly betrayed by the crown prince and thrown into prison noblewoman Elizabeth escapes her kingdom with the legendary Seven Grimoires With help from a viscount from a neighboring nation she rebuilds her life while plotting revenge against the kingdom that cast her aside

original_name: 天は赤い河のほとり
name: 天は赤い河のほとり
title: 天は赤い河のほとり
overview_en: After a mysterious hand drags her beneath a puddle modern Japanese teenager Yuri awakens in the Hittite Empire of the 14th century BCE Thrust into a deadly struggle for the throne she joins Prince Kail to battle assassins outwit royal conspiracies and survive a world at war As her exploits earn her renown as the goddess Ishtar Yuri must choose between her old life and an uncertain future

original_name: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
name: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
title: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
title_en: The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Road Trip in Another World
overview_en: Late 20 s caregiver Rin Takanashi has been summoned as a saint only to then be dumped alone in another world Equipped with just her ridiculously overpowered god like skills Motor Home aka Mochan and Survival she decides to indulge her love of solo camping and cooking in this strange new place Thus begins Rin s journey one filled with gourmet cuisine and an array of wonderful companions along the way
